Class StreamingGraph

java.lang.Object
database.StreamingGraph
public class StreamingGraph extends Object
Weighted directed graph that dynamically maps String entity IDs to integer vertices. Provides APIs to manage vertices, relationships and exports to standard algs4 graph.

  • Constructor Summary

    • StreamingGraph

      public StreamingGraph()

  • Method Details

    • addVertex

      public void addVertex(String entityId)
      Adds a new vertex mapped to the entityId.
      Parameters:
      entityId - unique identifier of the entity

    • removeVertex

      public void removeVertex(String entityId)
      Removes a vertex and all its connected incoming and outgoing edges.
      Parameters:
      entityId - unique identifier of the entity to remove

    • addEdge

      public void addEdge(String fromId, String toId, double weight, String relationType, LocalDate timestamp, boolean fullyWatched, String details)
      Adds or updates a directed weighted edge between two entities.
      Parameters:
      fromId - source entity ID
      toId - target entity ID
      weight - edge weight (e.g. watch time or rating)
      relationType - type of relationship (e.g. WATCHES, RATES)
      timestamp - date of the interaction
      fullyWatched - whether the content was fully watched
      details - additional relationship information

    • removeEdge

      public void removeEdge(String fromId, String toId, String relationType)
      Removes a specific relationship between two vertices.
      Parameters:
      fromId - source entity ID
      toId - target entity ID
      relationType - type of relationship to remove

    • getEdge

      public RelationshipEdge getEdge(String fromId, String toId, String relationType)
      Finds a specific relationship edge.
      Parameters:
      fromId - source entity ID
      toId - target entity ID
      relationType - type of relationship
      Returns:
      the edge if found, null otherwise

    • adj

      public Iterable<RelationshipEdge> adj(String entityId)
      Returns the outgoing relationships of a vertex.
      Parameters:
      entityId - unique identifier of the entity
      Returns:
      iterable collection of relationship edges

    • vertices

      public Iterable<String> vertices()
      Returns all active vertex IDs in the graph.
      Returns:
      iterable of entity IDs

    • V

      public int V()
      Returns the number of active vertices in the graph.
      Returns:
      number of vertices

    • E

      public int E()
      Returns the total number of relationships/edges in the graph.
      Returns:
      number of edges

    • toEdgeWeightedDigraph

      public edu.princeton.cs.algs4.EdgeWeightedDigraph toEdgeWeightedDigraph()
      Exports the dynamic graph to a standard algs4 EdgeWeightedDigraph. Maps active string IDs to contiguous integer indices dynamically.
      Returns:
      EdgeWeightedDigraph instance
